title: Beyond the Posts: Decoding BJP and TMC’s Social Media Strategies
description: Setting the Context With elections increasingly shaped by digital platforms, social media has become a key site of political communication, narrative construction, and voter engagement. In the context of West Bengal, the online communication strategies of the Bharatiya Janata Party […] The post Beyond the Posts: Decoding BJP and TMC’s Social Media Strategies appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
